steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The preposition of is followed by three objects in a series: healing, self-discovery, and memory.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
Objects of a preposition follow the preposition directly without intervening punctuation.

A correctly connects of directly to the objects.

Those choices, and D insert punctuation (comma, em dash, colon) between the preposition and its objects.

That confirms A is correct.
